name_cn:
『Burberry』
🔥🔥Burberry new mini two-tone canvas and leather tote bag, made of topstitched leather and cotton canvas, can be carried by the top handle or with an adjustable shoulder strap.
Size: 23 x 8 x19cm, 2412
